title: Naan Bombay Ponnu Lyrics Vedi Song Lyrics
singerName: Mamtha Sharma, MLR Karthikeyan, Senthil Dass
stanzas:
Singers: Mamtha Sharma, MLR.Karthikeyan, Senthil Dass
Song: Bombay Ponnu

Naan bombay ponnu,
lucknow lucknow lucknow, idhu lucknow kannu
Jiginna jinnu,
Em pinnala, Em-munnala, Em KaiMela emmela
Mela mela mela mela mela

Kaarakudi gaanaavo naan kavundhadhu un kannaala
Thoothukudi aan yaaru naan vilundhuputtan munnala
Mela mela mela mela mela
Mela mela mela mela mela

Mein bombay ponnu,
lucknow lucknow lucknow, idhu lucknow kannu
Jiginna jinnu

Alcohol-lu en kaalu, Aatu paalu en thozhu
sexy yaana sendhelu, sixty litre petrol-lu
Mathalam thaan pinnaadi, Maada pura munnaadi
Kaal mulacha kannaadi, Unmaya nee ponnadi  ..(Kaarakudi gaanaavo..)

Naan bombay ponnu, [mel mela]
lucknow lucknow lucknow, idhu lucknow kannu [mel mela]
Jiginna jinnu

Moochu vaangum moonaaru, Moodi vacha paalaaru
Noothuku naan 500-ru, theepidicha thanneeru
Saamburaani un maeni, Un siripu symphoni
Pallu vella pattaani
....

Kaarakudi gaanaavo naan kavundhadhu un kannaala
Thoothukudi aan yaaru naan vilundhuputtan munnala
Mela mela mela mela mela me la la mela mela
Mela mela mela mela mela

Naan bombay ponnu, [mel mela]
lucknow lucknow lucknow, idhu lucknow kannu [mel mela]
Jiginna jinnu [mela]

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Naan Bombay Ponnu'?

The song celebrates the joy and vibrancy of life, highlighting themes of love and fun.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Vedi'?

In Vedi, this song captures the lively spirit of the characters and their interactions, adding to the film's energetic atmosphere.

Who are the singers of 'Naan Bombay Ponnu'?

The song features talented singers Mamtha Sharma, MLR Karthikeyan, and Senthil Dass.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Naan Bombay Ponnu' was composed by Vijay Antony, known for his catchy and engaging tunes.

When was 'Naan Bombay Ponnu' released?

The song was released on September 8, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naan Bombay Ponnu, the lively beats and catchy lyrics create an atmosphere of celebration and joy. The song encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth and love, making it a perfect anthem for parties and festivities. As the characters in Vedi express their exuberance, listeners are drawn into a world of fun and excitement. The collaboration of talented singers and the vibrant music composition evoke feelings of happiness and energy.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Bombay Ponnu from Vedi is a vibrant celebration of life and love, featuring an electrifying collaboration between Mamtha Sharma, MLR Karthikeyan, and Senthil Dass. With Vijay Antony's infectious beats and Thamarai's catchy lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the joy and energy that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: I am a girl from Bombay, Lucknow, Lucknow, this is Lucknow's eye. Jiginna jinnu, what about me, what about my hands, mela mela mela mela mela.
In Kaarakudi, I sang because of your eyes. Who am I from Thoothukudi, I have fallen in front of you. Mela mela mela mela mela mela mela mela mela.
I am a girl from Bombay, Lucknow, Lucknow, this is Lucknow's eye. Jiginna jinnu.
My legs are like alcohol, my friend is like a sexy drink, sixty liters of petrol. The back is a mess, the front is a mess. If you look closely, you are the truth.
I am a girl from Bombay, [mela mela] Lucknow, Lucknow, this is Lucknow's eye [mela] Jiginna jinnu.
The one who takes the nose is a thief, the one who closes the door is a fool. I am worth 500 for a hundred, the water that burns. Your beauty is like a symphony, your smile is like a pearl.
In Kaarakudi, I sang because of your eyes. Who am I from Thoothukudi, I have fallen in front of you. Mela mela mela mela mela me la la mela mela mela mela mela.
I am a girl from Bombay, [mela mela] Lucknow, Lucknow, this is Lucknow's eye [mela] Jiginna jinnu.
